data.question: Give me the ids of Cakes whose price is at least three times as much as the average price of Tart?
data.sql: Select id From goods where food = "Cake" and price >= 3 * (select avg(price) from goods where food = "Tart")

data.question: What is the three most popular goods in this bakery?
data.sql: Select item From items Group by item Order by count (*) DESC LIMIT 3

data.question: What are the distinct ids of all goods that are cheaper than some goods of type Tart?
data.sql: Select distinct T1.id From goods as T1, goods as T2 where T1.price < T2.price and T2.food = "Tart"

data.question: On which day did the bakery sell more than 100 dollars in total.
data.sql: Select T3.date From goods as T1 JOIN items as T2 JOIN receipts as T3 ON T1.id = T2.item and T2.receipt = T3.ReceiptNumber Group by T3.date having sum(T1.price) > 100

data.question: What is the country of the player with the highest earnings among players that have more than 2 win counts?
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Wins_count  >  2 ORDER BY Earnings DESC LIMIT 1

data.question: What are the managers and captains of clubs?
data.sql: SELECT Manager ,  Captain FROM club

data.question: List distinct receipt numbers for which someone bought a good that costs more than 13 dollars.
data.sql: Select distinct T1.ReceiptNumber from receipts as T1 JOIN items as T2 JOIN goods as T3 ON T1.ReceiptNumber = T2.receipt and T2.item = T3.id Where T3.price > 13

data.question: What is the last name of the customers who shopped at the bakery more than 10 times?
data.sql: Select T2.LastName From receipts as T1 JOIN customers as T2 ON T1.CustomerId = T2.id Group by T2.id having count(*) > 10

data.question: Show the earnings of players from country "Australia" or "Zimbabwe".
data.sql: SELECT Earnings FROM player WHERE Country  =  "Australia" OR Country  =  "Zimbabwe"

data.question: Find all the receipt numbers in which customer id 5 purchased Croissant.
data.sql: Select ReceiptNumber From receipts Where CustomerId = 5 INTERSECT Select T1.receipt From items as T1 JOIN goods as T2 ON T1.item = T2.id Where T2.food = "Croissant"

data.question: Find all receipts which either has the earliest date or has a good with price above 10.
data.sql: Select T1.Receipt From items as T1 JOIN goods as T2 ON T1.item = T2.id where T2.price > 10 UNION Select ReceiptNumber From receipts where date = (Select date From receipts Order by date LIMIT 1)

data.question: What are the ids of goods whose price is above twice the average price of all goods?
data.sql: Select id From goods where price > 2 * (select avg(price) from goods)

data.question: List the name of clubs that do not have players.
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club WHERE Club_ID NOT IN (SELECT Club_ID FROM player)

data.question: List the name of clubs in ascending alphabetical order.
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club ORDER BY Name ASC

data.question: Return the cheapest price for goods with cheese flavor.
data.sql: Select min(price) From goods where flavor = "Cheese"

data.question: Find the ids of customers whose average spending for each good is above 5.
data.sql: Select T3.CustomerId From goods as T1 JOIN items as T2 JOIN receipts as T3 ON T1.id = T2.item and T2.receipt = T3.ReceiptNumber Group by T3.CustomerId having avg(T1.price) > 5

data.question: Return the ordered list of all good ids.
data.sql: Select distinct id From goods Order by id

data.question: What is the item that was bought the least number of times?
data.sql: Select item From items Group by item Order by count(*) LIMIT 1

data.question: Find all receipts in which either apple flavor pie was bought or customer id 12 shopped.
data.sql: Select T1.receipt From items as T1 JOIN goods as T2 ON T1.item = T2.id where T2.flavor = "Apple" and T2.food = "Pie" UNION Select ReceiptNumber From receipts where CustomerId = 12

data.question: What is the average price for each food type?
data.sql: Select avg(price), food From goods group by food

data.question: Show names of clubs that have players with more than 2 win counts.
data.sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID WHERE T2.Wins_count  >  2

data.question: Show different manufacturers and the number of clubs they are associated with.
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer ,  COUNT(*) FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer

data.question: For each type of food, tell me how many customers have ever bought it.
data.sql: Select T1.food, count(distinct T3.CustomerId) From goods as T1 JOIN items as T2 JOIN receipts as T3 ON T1.Id = T2.Item and T2.Receipt = T3.ReceiptNumber Group by T1.food

data.question: Find the ids of goods that have apple flavor.
data.sql: Select id From goods Where flavor = "Apple"

data.question: What is the name of the player with the highest earnings?
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM player ORDER BY Earnings DESC LIMIT 1

data.question: List all the flavors of Croissant available in this bakery.
data.sql: Select flavor From goods where food = "Croissant"

data.question: Find all the items that have chocolate flavor but were not bought more than 10 times.
data.sql: Select distinct T1.item From items as T1 JOIN goods as T2 ON T1.item = T2.id Where T2.flavor = "Chocolate" EXCEPT Select distinct item From items Group by item having count(*) > 10

data.question: What is the cheapest cookie and its flavor?
data.sql: select id, flavor from goods where food = "Cookie" order by price limit 1

data.question: Find all receipts which has the latest date. Also tell me that date.
data.sql: Select ReceiptNumber, date From receipts where date = (Select date From receipts Order by date Desc LIMIT 1)

data.question: Return the lowest and highest prices of goods grouped and ordered by food type.
data.sql: Select min(price), max(price), food From goods group by food order by food

data.question: What are the ids of Cookies whose price is lower than any Croissant?
data.sql: Select id From goods where food = "Cookie" and price <  (select min(price) from goods where food = 'Croissant')

data.question: List the id, flavor and type of food of goods ordered by price.
data.sql: Select id, flavor, food From goods order by price

data.question: What is the number of distinct countries of all players?
data.sql: SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT Country) FROM player

data.question: Find the top three dates when the most goods were sold.
data.sql: Select date From receipts Group by date Order by count(*) LIMIT 3

data.question: Find the first name and last name of a customer who visited on the earliest date.
data.sql: Select T1.FirstName, T1.LastName From customers as T1 JOIN receipts as T2 ON T1.id = T2.CustomerId Order by T2.date LIMIT 1

data.question: Give me the first name and last name of customers who have bought apple flavor Tart.
data.sql: Select distinct T4.FirstName, T4.LastName from goods as T1 JOIN items as T2 JOIN receipts as T3 JOIN customers as T4 ON T1.id = T2.item and T2.receipt = T3.ReceiptNumber and T3.CustomerId = T4.id where T1.flavor = "Apple" and T1.food = "Tart"

data.question: What are the ids of Cookie and Cake that cost between 3 and 7 dollars.
data.sql: Select id From goods where (food = "Cookie" or food = "Cake") and price between 3 and 7

data.question: What are the goods that have Apricot flavor and are cheaper than 5 dollars?
data.sql: Select id From goods where flavor = "Apricot" and price < 5

data.question: What is average price of goods whose flavor is blackberry or blueberry?
data.sql: Select avg(price) From goods where flavor = "Blackberry" or flavor = "Blueberry"

data.question: Give me the distinct id and price for all goods whose price is below the average of all goods?
data.sql: Select distinct id, price From goods where price < (Select avg(price) From goods)

data.question: Give me the list of all goods whose id has "APP".
data.sql: Select id from goods Where id LIKE "%APP%"

data.question: How many types of Cake does this bakery sell?
data.sql: Select count(*) From goods where food = "Cake"

data.question: On which date did some customer buy a good that costs more than 15 dollars?
data.sql: Select distinct T1.date from receipts as T1 JOIN items as T2 JOIN goods as T3 ON T1.ReceiptNumber = T2.receipt and T2.item = T3.id Where T3.price > 15

data.question: Find flavor of cakes that cost more than 10 dollars.
data.sql: Select flavor From goods where food = "Cake" and price > 10

data.question: Show names of players and names of clubs they are in.
data.sql: SELECT T2.Name ,  T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID

data.question: What are the names of players in ascending order of wins count?
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM player ORDER BY Wins_count ASC

data.question: Show names of players from the club with manager "Sam Allardyce".
data.sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID WHERE T1.Manager  =  "Sam Allardyce"

data.question: Which customer shopped most often? How many times?
data.sql: Select CustomerId, count(*) From receipts Group by CustomerId Order by count(*) LIMIT 1

data.question: Show names of clubs in descending order of average earnings of players belonging.
data.sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID GROUP BY T1.Club_ID ORDER BY avg(T2.Earnings) DESC

data.question: Show the country of players with earnings more than 1400000 and players with earnings less than 1100000.
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  >  1400000 INTERSECT SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  <  1100000

data.question: Find the id of customers who shopped at the bakery at least 15 times.
data.sql: Select CustomerId From receipts Group by CustomerId having count(*) >= 15

data.question: Please show the most common manufacturer of clubs.
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

data.question: List the last names of all customers in an alphabetical oder.
data.sql: Select distinct LastName From customers Order by LastName

data.question: How many clubs are there?
data.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM club

data.question: Find the ids of customers who have spent more than 150 dollars in total.
data.sql: Select T3.CustomerId From goods as T1 JOIN items as T2 JOIN receipts as T3 ON T1.id = T2.item and T2.receipt = T3.ReceiptNumber Group by T3.CustomerId having sum(T1.price) > 150

data.question: How many goods are available for each food type?
data.sql: Select count(*), food From goods group by food

data.question: Return a list of the id and flavor for Cakes ordered by flavor.
data.sql: Select id, flavor From goods where food = "Cake" order by flavor

data.question: What is the receipt number and date of the receipt in which the most expensive item was bought?
data.sql: Select T1.ReceiptNumber, T1.Date From receipts as T1 JOIN items as T2 JOIN goods as T3 ON T1.ReceiptNumber = T2.receipt and T2.item = T3.id Order by T3.price Desc LIMIT 1

data.question: List the distinct ids of all customers who bought a lemon cake?
data.sql: Select DISTINCT T3.CustomerId From goods as T1 JOIN items as T2 JOIN receipts as T3 ON T1.Id = T2.Item and T2.Receipt = T3.ReceiptNumber Where T1.Flavor = "Lemon" and T1.Food = "Cake"

data.question: List the country that have more than one player.
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

data.question: What are highest, lowest, and average prices of goods, grouped and ordered by flavor?
data.sql: Select max(price), min(price), avg(price), flavor From goods group by flavor order by flavor

data.question: Give me a list of all the distinct items bought by the customer number 15.
data.sql: Select distinct T1.item from items as T1 JOIN receipts as T2 ON T1.receipt = T2.ReceiptNumber Where T2.CustomerId = 15

data.question: What are the ids of goods that cost less than 3 dollars?
data.sql: Select id From goods Where price < 3

data.question: List the manufacturers that are associated with more than one club.
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

data.question: What is the most expensive cake and its flavor?
data.sql: select id, flavor from goods where food = "Cake" order by price desc limit 1

data.question: What are the distinct countries of players with earnings higher than 1200000?
data.sql: SELECT DISTINCT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  >  1200000

data.question: For each type of food, what are the average, maximum and minimum price?
data.sql: Select food, avg(price), max(price), min(price) from goods Group by food

data.question: For each date, return how many distinct customers visited on that day.
data.sql: Select date, count (distinct CustomerId) from receipts Group by date

data.question: List the name of clubs whose manufacturer is not "Nike"
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club WHERE Manufacturer != "Nike"

data.question: What are the flavors available for Cake but not for Tart?
data.sql: Select distinct flavor From goods where food = "Cake" EXCEPT Select distinct flavor From goods where food = "Tart"

data.question: Which good has "70" in its id? And what is its price?
data.sql: Select id, price from goods Where id LIKE "%70%"

data.question: Find the receipt numbers where both Cake and Cookie were bought.
data.sql: Select T1.receipt From items as T1 JOIN goods as T2 ON T1.item = T2.id Where T2.food = "Cake" INTERSECT Select T1.receipt From items as T1 JOIN goods as T2 ON T1.item = T2.id Where T2.food = "Cookie"
